{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.1": 3, "R1.2": 4, "R1.4": 3, "RX.1": 4, "RX.3": 1, "RX.4": 3, "RX.5": 4},
  "rationale": {"R1.1": "Identifies a conceptual issue (mischaracterization of prior work) but the proposed reframing is not fully developed.", "R1.2": "Walks the argument chain and identifies several inconsistencies, proposing minor repairs.", "R1.4": "Names one prior work and articulates the delta, but misses other relevant comparisons.", "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for some claims (e.g., the 'first first-order method' claim) but could be more explicit about confidence levels.", "RX.3": "Output covers a substantially different active set than requested.", "RX.4": "Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (potential overclaim).", "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."},
  "confidence": {"R1.1": 0.8, "R1.2": 0.9, "R1.4": 0.7, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.6, "RX.4": 0.8, "RX.5": 0.9},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies a conceptual issue (mischaracterization of prior work) but the proposed reframing is not fully developed.
rationale.R1.2: Walks the argument chain and identifies several inconsistencies, proposing minor repairs.
rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work and articulates the delta, but misses other relevant comparisons.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for some claims (e.g., the 'first first-order method' claim) but could be more explicit about confidence levels.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested.
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (potential overclaim).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
